---
title: "Arli-griz Plays Golf (46% Gravel)"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="20.09" data-elevation="3712.93" data-time="153" data-road-quality="74" data-has-gravel="true">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">Wildcat Creek Trail</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Meadows Canyon Trail</span></div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/arlington-to-southpark/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>20.09</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3712.93 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~2:30</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.61 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">74%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-to-southpark/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>8.86</td>
      <td>44.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.94</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>2.86</td>
      <td>14.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>2.54</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>2.28</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.61</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-to-southpark/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,864</td>
      <td>6.5</td>
      <td>65 ± 34</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Arlington Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>431</td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>16 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Arlington Boulevard (8% avg)</td>
      <td>372</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>12 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Arlington Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>69</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Terrace Drive (4% avg)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>438</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>16 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Golf Course Trail (3% avg)</td>
      <td>252</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Quarry Trail (1% avg)</td>
      <td>179</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,864</td>
      <td>20.2</td>
      <td>153 ± 68</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Arlington Boulevard (4% avg)</td>
      <td>431</td>
      <td>1.7</td>
      <td>16 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Arlington Boulevard (8% avg)</td>
      <td>372</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>12 ± 7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Arlington Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>69</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Terrace Drive (4% avg)</td>
      <td>123</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>18</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Wildcat Canyon Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>438</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>16 ± 8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Golf Course Trail (3% avg)</td>
      <td>252</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Quarry Trail (1% avg)</td>
      <td>179</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>7 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>7.5</td>
      <td>50</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-to-southpark/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>9.2</td>
      <td>46.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>3.2</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>13.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>7.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>4.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>2.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
